candidate.title: Evaluation SLO, alert routing, and non-NVIDIA platform observability evidence

repo_state.git_status_before_task: git status --short returned no changed paths before task-3 edits.

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Searched local raw/links, raw/crawler, raw/github, ai_infra manifests, and r7 task-1/task-2 state for SLO, SLA, service objective, alert, alerting, threshold, Alertmanager, Grafana, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, incident, postmortem, benchmark environment, trace, profiling, DCGM, Nsight, ROCm, AMD, TPU, XPU, Gaudi, LangSmith, Phoenix, Ragas, Langfuse, and evaluation dataset audit terms. Existing evidence covered OpenTelemetry GenAI traces/metrics/events, LangSmith/Phoenix trace and experiment stores, Ragas/lm-evaluation-harness mechanics, Langfuse dataset versioning, NCCL Inspector Prometheus/Grafana/RAS/Spectrum-X, SGLang router/runtime operational signals, and NVIDIA DCGM/Nsight telemetry, but lacked bounded general alert-routing/SLO mechanics and non-NVIDIA accelerator observability notes.
local_checks.wiki_search: Evaluation Observability Reliability Infrastructure and AI Infra Coverage Map explicitly listed production SLO, alert threshold/routing, incident/postmortem, benchmark-environment, non-NVIDIA observability, and evaluation dataset audit evidence as remaining gaps. Data RAG Pipeline and Security Governance pages already covered adjacent Langfuse dataset versioning and RAG governance boundaries, so this task did not duplicate those claims.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md already routes the Evaluation Observability Reliability Infrastructure and AI Infra Coverage Map pages; the task updated those existing reference pages and did not create a new standalone page.

duplicate_checks.result: duplicate boundary for OpenTelemetry GenAI, LangSmith, Phoenix, Ragas, lm-evaluation-harness, DCGM, Nsight, and benchmark-run metadata mechanics; updated only with alerting/SLO routing mechanics and AMD/Gaudi observability mechanics.
duplicate boundary for NCCL Inspector, Prometheus/Grafana dashboards, RAS, NVBandwidth, Spectrum-X, RoCE, and NVIDIA fabric telemetry; not edited because those claims were already represented.

duplicate boundary for vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, Triton, llama.cpp, ONNX Runtime GenAI, PegaFlow, and SGLang runtime operational metrics; not edited because task-3 sources are evaluation/alerting/platform-observability mechanics.
duplicate boundary for Langfuse RAG tracing and dataset-versioning evidence; not edited because evaluation dataset retention/access audit run evidence remains unavailable.

duplicate boundary for inference-runtime production operations evidence; task-3 avoided repeating SGLang router aborts, PD disaggregation, KV-event/cache operations, warmup, startup, profiling, and rollout controls.
duplicate boundary for RAG governance, deletion/retention, PII, vector RBAC/tenancy, and Langfuse dataset versioning; task-3 avoided repeating source-to-vector or RAG access-policy claims.

selected_source_candidates.coverage: Prometheus alerting rule expressions and stabilization windows; Alertmanager route-tree receivers, grouping, inhibition, mute/active intervals, and repeat behavior; Grafana notification policies, contact points, SLO/SLI/error-budget views, and Grafana AI Observability LLM metrics and alert examples.
AMD Device Metrics Exporter Prometheus-format GPU/NIC metrics, ROCm/AMD SMI system-management surfaces, and Intel Gaudi Prometheus Metric Exporter metrics for Kubernetes/container environments.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: The web probe did not return reliable page content in this run, so TPU monitoring facts were not promoted into the curated wiki.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Do not add new source claims when link probes do not produce usable source evidence.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: No public production incident, postmortem, or benchmark source was selected because the verified sources only support mechanics and platform telemetry surfaces.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Do not claim production SLOs, alert thresholds, incidents, postmortems, or benchmark baselines without concrete service, environment, timing, impact, remediation, owner, or run-artifact context.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: No crawler source subscription or Domain Channel was added; the sources are one-shot bounded official notes.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Prefer one-shot bounded raw notes unless repeated source refresh is proven necessary.

gap_reason: The local wiki and raw corpus already covered LLM tracing, experiment stores, evaluation harnesses, NVIDIA GPU telemetry/profiling, NCCL Prometheus/Grafana/RAS/fabric observability, SGLang runtime operational metrics, and Langfuse dataset versioning, but did not preserve bounded official-source evidence for general alert rule/routing/SLO mechanics or non-NVIDIA AMD/Gaudi platform observability. The selected sources fill those mechanics surfaces while leaving production SLO definitions, validated alert thresholds and routes, incidents/postmortems, local benchmark environment results, TPU/XPU production observability, and evaluation dataset retention/access audit evidence open.
